name: High income single earner
description: Employee earning €60,000 annually. INPS contributions (9.19%) are deducted from gross BEFORE calculating IRPEF. Benefits from 2026 rate reduction (33% vs 35% on €28k-€50k bracket, saving €440). Employment credit fully phased out above €50,000. Verified using verify_italy_tax.py script implementing official formulas.

sources.description: INPS employee contributions are deducted from gross before IRPEF calculation
2026 reduced rate provides savings vs 2025 (€22,000 × 2% rate reduction on second bracket)
Verified using verify_italy_tax.py (independent Python implementation of official formulas)
